case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. VS. ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE YAM

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINITFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERGIO HERNANDEZ, COLLECTIONS. DEFENDANT ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE YAM IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,310.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT WAS DELINQUENT ON HIS LOAN AGREEMENT AND OWES THE BALANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,385.66 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 07/27/2018 AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED OCT-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $150.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
